searchTerm: Garage door repair in Culver City, CA
notes: "Garage door supplier" is the dominant category in the top 5 of this search despite the search being service-intent. The semantic categoryServiceVsProduct finding is disabled to avoid giving prospects bad advice — telling them to switch categories that successful competitors actively use.

research.summary: In garage-door-repair searches, GBP category match is NOT the dominant ranking lever — review depth, review velocity, and citation consistency dominate. Top performers use 'Garage door supplier' as primary category at 5:4 over 'Repair service' even for service-intent queries, because 'Supplier' is the broader/legacy GBP category and Google's NLP treats it as a 'garage-door entity' tag without penalizing repair intent. Empirical evidence consistently overrides semantic theory in this vertical.
research.recommendedPrimaryCategoryReasoning: Dominant choice among top-ranked businesses (5 of top 10 in Culver City; corroborated as standard in industry SEO guides). 'Garage door repair service' is a viable alternative but tends to LIMIT eligibility to repair-only queries. 'Supplier' is broader and works for both repair AND installation/replacement traffic.

topRankingFactors.benchmark: Top 3 average 112 reviews in this search; #1 (Rock) has 301. Target ≥100 to be competitive in top 5.
topRankingFactors.source: Whitespark 2026 Local Search Ranking Factors + Airtable empirical data

topRankingFactors.benchmark: ≥2 new reviews/month signals 'active and current' to Google. Top performers in this vertical typically generate 3-5/month.
topRankingFactors.source: Whitespark Review Recency study 2025; Sterling Sky case studies

topRankingFactors.benchmark: Top performers respond to >50% of reviews. Google treats response rate as engagement signal.
topRankingFactors.source: Sterling Sky, BrightLocal Consumer Review Survey

topRankingFactors.benchmark: Complete profiles include: 24/7 emergency availability (if offered), 1-2 GBP posts per week, regularly updated photos. Posts expire after 7 days.
topRankingFactors.source: Atomic Social GBP Optimization for Garage Door Repair

topRankingFactors.benchmark: Identical NAP on Yelp, Angi, BBB, HomeAdvisor, Houzz, MapQuest, Yellow Pages, Foursquare.
topRankingFactors.source: Local SEO Bot, Whitespark Citation Builder

topRankingFactors.benchmark: Title tag should include both 'garage door [repair|service]' AND the city name.
Schema present with NAP matching GBP and primary service area defined.
topRankingFactors.source: Schema.org LocalBusiness spec; Google Search Central

topRankingFactors.benchmark: Top performers publish dedicated pages per city they serve. Min 3-5 city pages for multi-city operators.
topRankingFactors.source: Contractor Marketing Pros Garage Door SEO

commonPitfalls: Multiple phone numbers on website (lead-aggregator tracking lines break NAP)
Generic CTA copy ('Contact Us', 'Learn More') instead of action-specific ('Get Free Quote', 'Call Now')
Mobile click-to-call missing or below the fold
Render-blocking CSS/JS in <head> slowing page load > 2.5s
Owner registered domain that doesn't include the brand name (citation graph weakened)
No GBP posts since >90 days ago (Google reads as 'dormant listing')
Photos uploaded once and never refreshed (stale gallery)
GBP description missing or <100 chars (incomplete profile signal)
research.titleTagExample: Garage Door Repair in Culver City, CA | Alvin Garage Door
research.h1Example: Garage Door Repair in Culver City - 24/7 Same Day Service
research.metaDescPattern: Lead with the service + city + a differentiator (response time, free quote, warranty)
research.metaDescExample: 24/7 garage door repair in Culver City, CA. Same-day service, licensed technicians, free quotes. Call (310) 555-1234.
voiceoverHooks: Review count gap vs top 3 (most impactful in this vertical because top performers have 100+ reviews)
Days since last review (>90 days = dormant signal, >180 = severe)
GBP posts staleness (top performers post weekly)
NAP mismatch on website (call-tracker number differing from GBP)
Domain doesn't match business brand name (citation graph signal)
No dedicated service-area pages (single-page sites lose multi-city ranking)
voiceoverAntipatterns: DO NOT advise switching from 'Garage door supplier' to 'Garage door repair service' — empirically the opposite of what top performers do.
DO NOT cite specific photo count thresholds (Google strips reliable photoCount from the panel; extractor disabled).
DO NOT cite GBP description length thresholds without postsVerified=true / descriptionVerified=true (extractor gating).
clientOnboardingChecklist: Verify GBP primary category = 'Garage door supplier' (or migrate if currently narrower)
Add all recommended secondary categories (up to 9)
Fill every service attribute (see recommendedServiceAttributes list)
Set complete business hours including any 24/7 emergency window
Write GBP description: 150-750 chars, service + city + differentiator
Upload minimum 20 photos (cover, logo, interior/exterior, team, completed work)
Set up automated Google review request SMS (Podium / Birdeye / GatherUp) — 30-45% conversion vs 5-10% for email
Build citation profile across all targets above; verify NAP exact match
Add LocalBusiness schema with full NAP + service area + hours
Set up review response process — target ≥50% response rate, ≥80% for negative reviews
Build service-area landing pages for each city served (min 3)
Audit website: HTTPS, schema, page load <2.5s, NAP above fold, single H1 with category + city

kpiTargets.rankingTimeline: Map Pack within 30-60 days; meaningful lead lift within 3-5 months

industryNotes: Emergency-repair queries rank faster than installation queries because they're geographically bounded with immediate intent.
73% of local searches happen on mobile — mobile-first audit weight is justified.
Businesses that respond to reviews are 1.7x more trustworthy per Google.
SMS review requests via automation hit 30-45% conversion vs 5-10% for email — significant for review-velocity ranking factor.
Map Pack appearances often happen within 30-60 days with aggressive GBP optimization; full ranking lift takes 3-5 months.
consumesIn: step-6-voiceover.mjs (cold-outreach video script — gating semantic findings via findingsDisabled)

FUTURE: admin onboarding wizard (display recommendedSecondaryCategories + recommendedServiceAttributes when adding a new garage-door-repair client)
FUTURE: portal KPI dashboard (use research.kpiTargets as success thresholds for client-side reporting)

localPackMapsWeights2026.note: Sum exceeds 1.0 because weights overlap (proximity is its own meta-factor that interacts with all others). 8 of top 10 individual signals come from GBP.

aiSearchVisibilityWeights2026_NEW.note: NEW category in Whitespark 2026 — tracks rankings in AI search results (Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, ChatGPT search). On-page content is the top lever in AI search, NOT GBP.

reviewSignalsTrendline.change: +4 pts; recency + sentiment now outweigh raw count
reviewSignalsTrendline.implication: A business with 200 reviews + none recent ranks BELOW a business with 80 reviews + steady weekly flow

industryResearchDeep.strongestIndividualSignal: Primary GBP category (strongest single ranking factor in Local Pack)

topNegativeRankingFactors2026.note: One of the most damaging issues a business can have. Direct corroboration for why our DB-gated categoryServiceVsProduct finding is critical — wrong advice here = #2 worst penalty.

topNegativeRankingFactors2026.factor: Permanently closed flag missing on closed business

topNegativeRankingFactors2026.note: Rankings begin to degrade in the final hour a business is open each day

topNegativeRankingFactors2026.factor: Hidden address for non-SAB (when guideline says to)
topNegativeRankingFactors2026.note: Paradox — following Google's own guideline hurts

keyShiftsSince2023: GBP signals remain dominant at 32% — 8 of top 10 individual Local Pack signals come from GBP
New AI Search Visibility tracking — top lever is on-page content (24%) NOT GBP (12%)
Recency now outweighs review count for ranking
directBenchmarkValidations: Whitespark 2026 confirms our voiceoverAntipattern about category-switching: incorrect primary category is the #2 negative ranking factor (penalty 214). Advising a successful business to switch from their winning category would be among the worst possible advice.
Whitespark 2026 confirms review velocity (recency) emphasis in research.topRankingFactors — recent stream > lifetime total.
Whitespark 2026 confirms business hours weight — locked in voiceoverHooks + commonPitfalls.
